title: verbascum × tundscheliense
intro: Verbascum × tundscheliense, a hybrid plant, is a cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum lychnitis, commonly known as mullein. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Verbascum × tundscheliense include soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
